creator: mph@pobox.com
text:
On Tue, May 12, 1998 at 06:43:00PM -0500, mcj@acquiesce.org wrote:

> By popular demand, I'm updating the mpg123 port to .59o

Great, but it doesn't build here.  Is it a Luigi-sound-driver issue?
(Same result on my personal post-2.2.6 machine.)

freefall:~/mpg123$ uname -a
FreeBSD freefall.freebsd.org 2.2.5-STABLE FreeBSD 2.2.5-STABLE #0: Sun Jan 11 17:58:51 PST 1998     jkh@freefall.freebsd.org:/d/src/sys/compile/FREEFALL  i386

freefall:~/mpg123$ make DISTDIR=~/dl
>> mpg123-0.59o.tar.gz doesn't seem to exist on this system.
>> Attempting to fetch from ftp://ftp.tu-clausthal.de/pub/unix/audio/mpg123/.

cc -O -pipe -c decode_i386.c
cc -O -pipe -c dct64_i386.c
as  -o getbits_.o getbits_.s
